section.div: 基于哔哩哔哩官方客户端移植的Linux版本 支持漫游
Dockernized ComfyUI with PyTorch & flash-attention for gfx1151 (AMD Strix Halo, Ryzen AI Max+ 395), relying on AMD's pre-built and pre-configured environment (no custom wheels)
